summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrediControl SaaS loan management system. Backend APIs are working well (94.7% success rate) but frontend has session management issues preventing full UI testing.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Session cookies remain valid after logout
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor security concern - sessions not properly invalidated

integration_issues.issue: User sessions are not persisting properly - frequent redirects to login page during navigation

passed_tests: Application loads correctly with beautiful dark theme
Admin login works and redirects to /admin
User registration works and creates user with 'user' role
Backend API endpoints work correctly (18/19 tests passed)
Customer CRUD operations work via API
Loan creation with automatic interest calculation works
Role-based access control works (admin blocked from user endpoints, user blocked from admin endpoints)

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (login/registration work, but session management issues prevent full testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management issue - user sessions are not persisting properly causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation. This prevents full testing of customer management, loan creation, and other user flows. The issue appears to be related to cookie handling or session expiration.
